schema.description: Resolve a conflict by selecting the winning fact or providing a fresh value. See spec §5.10.

winning_fact_id.description: ID of the winning fact — must be `fact_a.id` or `fact_b.id` from the conflict record.

new_value.description: The value carried by a fact. One of seven types defined in spec §2.1: plain string, number, boolean, null, long-form `text`, ISO 8601 `datetime`, or entity `ref`.

text.description: Long-form text value (e.g. agent notes, summaries).

ref.description: Reference to another entity URI. Used to build typed relations.

new_value.title: FactValue

schema.title: ConflictResolveRequest
